content.en:
As the Ultimate Ancient Demon, or the more powerful of the Ultimate Ancient Demons, and the strong man who survived the Final Tribulation, the Norm Ancient Demon naturally has the ability to be arrogant.

is just a junior, and judging from the breath, it has only been a breakthrough for a long time, which is equivalent to the ultimate ancient demon who has just broken through, and he dares to be so arrogant with him.

"Look for death!"

The Norm Ancient Demon was furious and shot directly at Ye Tian.

He directly cast the ultimate arcane technique that he is best at, the Eternal Demon Spear!

Nome Ancient Demon's Eternal Demon Spear once severely damaged an Ultimate Ancient Demon with a single blow, slashing an Ultimate Ancient Demon in three moves.

In his opinion, Ye Tian should not be able to catch his move, and he will inevitably be hit hard.

"Broken!"

The Eternal Demon Spear struck with a blow, shattering all time and space, ignoring the distance, and bombarding Ye Tian's body.

Dang!

The Eternal Demon Spear was blocked by a faint film, and he didn't even shake it.

And this layer of film is actually a spherical film, and it is also Ye Tian's space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane-Polar Space-Time Sphere, which has a terrifying defense.

This is a space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, and the Norm Ancient Demon's Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane naturally can't break this layer of 860 defense.

Now.

The Norm Ancient Demon also recognized the level of the Arctic Space-Time Orb.

"Impossible, how could you possibly create a space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane !!"

The Norm Ancients were shocked and terrified.

This is the space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, there are only a handful of Ultimate Ancient Demons who can truly comprehend this space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, just a few, I didn't expect a new Extreme Path Ultimate Extreme Venerable like Ye Tian to be such a space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane!

This is a defense-type space-time level extreme ultimate arcane, with no offensive type.

At this moment, he expected Ye Tian to only use this space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, so that even if he couldn't kill Ye Tian, Ye Tian wouldn't be able to kill him, and everyone would be tied.

But at this moment, Ye Tian unleashed the Extreme Path Space-Time Sword Blade, and a terrifying aura permeated out, and it was an attack-type space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane!

"Spare your life!"

The Ancient Demon of Nome begged for mercy.

However, Ye Tian did not stay behind, he didn't kill the ancient demons before, because his own strength had not yet improved.

But now, he has reached the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable level, even if he is not as good as the original Duowei Ancient Demon, but he is not afraid of other Ultimate Ancient Demons.

Moreover, if he killed the Norm Ancient Demon, he could obtain the resources on his body, and he didn't believe that the Ultimate Supreme Superior like the Norm Ancient Demon had not collected resources on his body before he fell asleep.

Killing a Nome Ancient Demon is enough to obtain a large amount of resources, and you can also improve your own cultivation strength, and your strength can skyrocket!

"Kill!"

The Extreme Time and Space Sword Blade directly cut the body of the Ancient Demon of Nome in two, and the light of the hundreds of millions of blades shattered all the space-time particles in its body, erasing the past and the future.

This moment.

The Norm Demon has fallen completely.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian grabbed the corpse of the Ancient Demon of Nome with one hand and took it away, and then quickly left.

When the other ancient demons saw this scene, they trembled one by one.

"Kill the Norm Ancient Demon in one move, this one is too terrifying, and it is undoubtedly the ultimate ultimate supreme that is comparable to the top!"

These ancient demon-level powerhouses originally wanted to cause trouble, but they didn't dare at the moment.

So, they honestly hid here, not daring to go out.

......

Doomsday Extreme Venerable, Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable, they also sensed the battle, but the battle fluctuations were too terrifying, and they didn't dare to approach.

After the battle was over, they came to the Terran as soon as possible and asked Ye Tian about the battle there.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, what just happened?"

Doomsday Supreme asked.

Ye Tian said lightly: "It's nothing, an ultimate ancient demon has been born!"

"What, the Ultimate Ancient Demon is born!"

They couldn't be more shocked than shocked, it's nothing, it's a big deal!

Ye Tian continued: "Don't worry, I've already killed the other party!"

Doom Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Supreme Venerable saw the corpse of the Ancient Demon of Nome, and the terrifying aura seemed to suffocate them.

The aura of the Norm Ancient Demon is too terrifying, even if it falls, a wisp of breath seems to be able to kill them.

However, such a terrifying existence was killed by Ye Tian!

It can be seen from this that Ye Tian's strength is terrifying!

They didn't ask much and left one by one.

Killing an Ultimate Ancient Demon is undoubtedly a big deal, what if you anger other Ultimate Ancient Demons?

But Ye Tian dared to kill, which showed that Ye Tian was not afraid, and they naturally didn't dare to ask more.

And after the Doomsday Supreme Venerable and they left, Ye Tiancai carefully inspected the items of the Norm Ancient Demon.

There is a huge void inside it, and a large number of treasure resources are stored inside.

There are simply too many ultimate treasures and various resources of the Extreme Dao.

The resources that Ye Tian has been looking for over the years are probably less than one thousandth compared to the resources here.

"Very good, with these resources, my body will become stronger, and my cultivation will be higher and higher. "

So in the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to cultivate and refine various resources.

Whether it is cultivation or physical strength, it is crazy to improve.

And. []

The Ancient Demon of Nome also has items on his body that assist in comprehending the ultimate rules of the Extreme Path, and he continues to use various copy bodies to analyze and comprehend, and comprehends the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Path extremely quickly, and his strength has steadily improved.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's physical strength was twice as strong as in the past, and his cultivation had also improved a lot, reaching the mid-stage realm of the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and the Extreme Dao Ultimate Will had also increased several times.

And with the assistance of the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragment and other treasures, the Ultimate Rule of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao has already comprehended the Sancheng realm.

For an Extreme Dao Ultimate Venerable, this realm is not low.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian was also trying to create the seventh form, and the original Duowei Ancient Demon had not developed a complete seventh form, the final form!

It wasn't easy for him to create a seventh form, but he had a large number of replica bodies, and he could try again and again, without fear of sacrificing replica bodies.

And the reason why Ye Tian wanted to create the seventh form was entirely because there was a treasure among the items of the Norm Ancient Demon, which was a bead, and a large amount of the aura of the Final Tribulation was stored inside this bead, and the other party actually stored it, and he should also want to study it.

Now, this Ultimate Tribulation Breath has cheapened Ye Tian and given him the idea of research.
